title: New Deal and Contact
excerpt: Hi everyone, I created an automation that generates a new deal when I change a status in the contacts. I would also like to automatically fill in the “contacts” column, how can I do it? Thank you

posts.author: magoo (massimo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone, I created an automation that generates a new deal when I change a status in the contacts. I would also like to automatically fill in the “contacts” column, how can I do it? Thank you

posts.author: magoo (massimo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve done that, thanks.
I created an automation that creates a new item when the status changes and copies the contact field.

image1085×270 10.4 KB

Now I would like that when the status of this deal changes with a specific label, another deal is created in another board, puts the name of the contact as the deal name, imports the contact field as contact and a phase field. It’s possible? thanks

posts.author: magoo (massimo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to put a mirror column in a formula, is it possible?
I see that some functions are not immediately usable, e.g. I added a column I don’t see it in the filters, is it possible to fix it?
